title: Chakra Ka Rakshak
subTitle: A police officer and soldier team up and decide to end the cybercriminals that pose a threat to the safety of people on the Internet.

title: Star Gold HD
subTitle: Shinda, a young man, plans a bank heist to gain quick money and marry his lover. However, his plans go haywire when he gets caught by the police.

title: Maatr
subTitle: A politician's son and his friends kidnap and sexually assault a school teacher, Vidya, and her daughter, Tia. After her daughter dies in the incident, the woman decides to take revenge.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Om Shanti
subTitle: When a terror outfit plans to target Hyderabad with a series of bomb blasts, five individuals from different walks of life come together to save the people.

title: Mukti Bhawan
subTitle: Daya wishes to attain salvation in Varanasi and takes his son, Rajiv, along with him. As days pass, Daya finds a companion in a widow while Rajiv is left in a state of dilemma.

title: Guru
subTitle: A failed boxer sees potential in a vegetable seller and begins training her in boxing. However, the two don't get along due to the former's harsh training style.

title: Baaghi 2
subTitle: Ronny, a soldier, learns of the disappearance of the daughter of his former lover. Soon, his intense investigation leads him to uncover a web of crimes and a secret from the past.

title: The Family Star
subTitle: Govardhan, a diligent architect, longs for a partner who understands his commitment to his large family. When Indu, a new tenant, moves in, his life starts to unfold in a new direction.

title: Chup Chup Ke
subTitle: A fisherman saves Jeetu from committing suicide, only to sell him to a moneylender. Jeetu is then forced to pose as a man with hearing and speech impairment, resulting in hilarious consequences.

title: Shootout at Lokhandwala
subTitle: A notorious gangster rules over the Mumbai's underworld with an iron fist. However, his growing influence prompts a group of police officers to plot a strategy to clear the city of organised crime.

title: Rowdy Rathore
subTitle: Shiva's life takes an unexpected turn when a child mistakes him for her father. Upon learning the truth, Shiva vows to change his ways for the better.

title: Main Hoon Na
subTitle: Major Ram is given orders to go undercover as a college student to protect a general's daughter from a rogue soldier. He must also fulfil his dying father's desire to reconcile with his family.

title: Main Hoon Na
subTitle: Major Ram is given orders to go undercover as a college student to protect a general's daughter from a rogue soldier. He must also fulfil his dying father's desire to reconcile with his family.

title: Isha
subTitle: A woman moves to a hill station with her family to start anew. However, things take a turn when her daughter gets possessed by a vengeful ghost of a woman who was murdered there.

title: EVARU
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Sanam Re
subTitle: Akash and Shruti, two classmates in love, are separated due to unforeseen circumstances. Years later, they get a second chance at their relationship when they meet in Canada.

title: Loveyapa
subTitle: Baani and Gaurav, a young couple, dream of marrying each other. However, in order to approve their union, Baani's father asks them to swap their phones to test their relationship.

title: Pyaar Kiya To Darna Kya
subTitle: When Suraj, a young man, falls for Muskan, her possessive brother takes an instant dislike towards him. However, to get his love, he must first win the hearts of her brother and uncle.

title: Police Diary
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Housefull 4
subTitle: Three brothers are set to marry three sisters. However, a peek into the distant past reveals to one of the brothers that their brides have been mixed up in their current reincarnation.

title: Salaar Part 1: Ceasefire
subTitle: Just when the prince of Khansaar is about to rise to the throne, a plan of overthrowing him is exercised and only one man can help him retrieve power.

title: Sultan
subTitle: Sultan Ali Khan's passion for wrestling pushes him to national glory, but the path to redemption and personal peace proves far tougher than any fight in the ring.

title: Singham Returns
subTitle: Bajirao Singham, an honest police officer, encounters Babaji, a god-man with connections to high profile politicians, when he investigates the death of an officer from his team.

title: Singham Returns
subTitle: Bajirao Singham, an honest police officer, encounters Babaji, a god-man with connections to high profile politicians, when he investigates the death of an officer from his team.

title: Ab Ke Baras
subTitle: Anjali comes to India to investigate recurring visions of her past life in her dreams. Later, she meets a thief who might have been her lover in another lifetime.

title: Love Sonia
subTitle: After her father sells her sister to a local landlord, Sonia sets out on a mission to rescue her sister from international sex traffickers.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: The Ghazi Attack
subTitle: In 1971, Ghazi, a submarine from Pakistan, tries to destroy the port at Vizag but, S21, an Indian submarine, poses as an obstacle.

title: Bang Bang
subTitle: A charming diamond thief and his unwitting sidekick embark on a rollercoaster of romance, espionage, and explosive transcontinental battles, proving that love can indeed conquer all.

title: Teri Baaton Mein Aisa Uljha Jiya
subTitle: A robotics engineer on the quest to find his ideal partner, falls in love with an intelligent female robot mistaking her for a real woman in Los Angeles.

title: Chennai Express
subTitle: Rahul, a young man, sets out to immerse his late grandfather's ashes at Rameshwaram. However, when he helps Meena, a runaway bride, board a train, he has to face the ire of her criminal family.

title: Maargan
subTitle: A serial killer targets women with a strange serum that turns their bodies black. Subsequently, a high-ranking police officer sets out to catch the culprit.

title: Housefull 5A
subTitle: After billionaire Ranjeet Dobriyal dies at a party on his luxury cruise ship, several fraudsters pretend to be his son in an attempt to inherit his estate.

title: Son of Sardaar 2
subTitle: Jassi returns home to reconcile with his wife but gets entangled in a mob conflict and chaotic Sikh wedding. He battles to save hostages and his marriage amidst cultural turmoil.

title: Son of Sardaar
subTitle: Jaswinder returns to his hometown to sell a piece of land he owns and falls in love with a young woman only to find out later that her family wants him dead.
